feed.subtitle: a journey to my tech life.

entry.title: Setup Kubernetes Cluster using K3S, MetalLB, LetsEncrypt on Bare Metal

link.title: Setup Kubernetes Cluster using K3S, MetalLB, LetsEncrypt on Bare Metal

entry.summary: Setup K3S Cluster By default Rancher K3S comes with Traefik 1.7. We will setup K3S without Traefik ingress in this tutorial. Execute below command on master node 1. curl -sfL https://get.k3s.io | sh -s - server --datastore-endpoint="mysql://user:pass@tcp(ip_address:3306)/databasename" --disable traefik --node-taint CriticalAddonsOnly=true:NoExecute --tls-san 192.168.1.2 --tls-san k3s.h...
